title: Lawful Basis Documentation
description: Document lawful basis for processing client and prospect personal data.

title: DSAR Response Within One Month
description: Respond to data subject access requests within one month with possible two-month extension.

title: Right to Erasure
description: Honor right to erasure with verifiable deletion across systems and backups.

title: Right to Data Portability
description: Provide personal data in structured, commonly used, machine-readable format on request.

title: Granular Consent for Marketing
description: Obtain freely given specific consent for marketing communications.

title: 72-Hour Breach Notification
description: Notify supervisory authority of personal data breach within 72 hours.

title: Data Subject Breach Notification
description: Notify affected data subjects without undue delay when breach poses high risk.

title: Data Protection by Design
description: Implement appropriate technical and organizational measures by design and default.

title: Data Protection Impact Assessment
description: Conduct DPIA for high-risk processing including profiling.

title: DPO Appointment Where Required
description: Appoint Data Protection Officer where core activities involve large-scale monitoring.

title: Cross-Border Transfer Safeguards
description: Use SCCs, BCRs, or adequacy decisions for personal data transfers outside EEA.

title: Records of Processing Activities
description: Maintain Article 30 records of processing activities.

title: Data Minimization
description: Process only personal data adequate, relevant, and limited to purpose.

title: Purpose Limitation
description: Collect personal data for specified, explicit, and legitimate purposes.

title: Storage Limitation
description: Retain personal data only as long as necessary for processing purposes.

title: Security Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement controls aligned with AICPA TSC Common Criteria for security.

title: Availability Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement availability controls including monitoring, capacity, and DR.

title: Processing Integrity Controls
description: Implement processing integrity ensuring complete, valid, accurate, timely, authorized processing.

title: Confidentiality Controls
description: Identify, classify, and protect confidential client information.

title: Privacy Trust Services Criteria
description: Implement privacy controls per AICPA TSC P1 covering notice, choice, collection.

title: Role-Based Access Controls
description: Implement RBAC with periodic review and removal upon termination.

title: Continuous Monitoring
description: Implement continuous monitoring of system performance and security events.

title: Vendor Risk Management
description: Assess and monitor vendors with access to systems or data.

title: Change Management Process
description: Document and test changes with approval workflow before production deployment.

title: Security Incident Response
description: Maintain incident response with detection, escalation, containment, and review.

title: ISMS Establishment
description: Establish, implement, maintain, and improve an Information Security Management System.

title: Annual Risk Assessment
description: Conduct documented information security risk assessments at planned intervals.

title: Information Asset Inventory
description: Maintain inventory of information assets with classification and ownership.

title: Cryptographic Controls Policy
description: Define and implement policy on cryptographic controls including key lifecycle.

title: Supplier Information Security
description: Address information security in supplier agreements and monitor service delivery.

title: Business Continuity Management
description: Plan, implement, verify, and review information security continuity.

title: Secure System Engineering
description: Apply secure system engineering principles for design, implementation, and operation.

title: Internal ISMS Audit
description: Conduct internal audits of ISMS at planned intervals.

title: Management Review
description: Conduct top management review of ISMS at planned intervals.

title: Corrective Action Procedure
description: Implement corrective actions for nonconformities with effectiveness review.

title: PECR Marketing Consent
description: Obtain consent before marketing electronic communications per ePrivacy.

title: Cookie Consent for Trackers
description: Obtain explicit consent for non-essential cookies and tracking technologies.

title: Marketing List Lawful Basis
description: Document lawful basis for marketing list aggregation and processing.

title: GoBD Digital Record Retention
description: Retain digital records per German GoBD principles for German clients.

title: GoBD-Compliant Invoice Storage
description: Store invoices per GoBD with audit trail and immutability.

title: German BDSG Specifications
description: Apply BDSG specifications to GDPR processing for German clients.

title: Employee Data Protection
description: Apply BDSG Section 26 to employee personal data processing in Germany.

title: AICPA Code of Professional Conduct
description: Comply with AICPA Code of Professional Conduct for accounting professionals.

title: Auditor Independence
description: Maintain independence in fact and appearance for attest engagements.

title: Client Confidentiality
description: Maintain client confidentiality with limited disclosure per AICPA Code.

title: PCAOB Auditing Standards
description: Apply PCAOB auditing standards to public-company audits.

title: Audit Documentation Retention
description: Retain audit documentation for at least seven years per PCAOB AS 1215.

title: Internal Control Over Financial Reporting
description: Establish and maintain ICFR with annual management assessment.

title: Auditor Independence Under SOX
description: Avoid prohibited non-audit services to audit clients per SOX Section 201.

title: Audit Partner Rotation
description: Rotate lead and review audit partners every five years per SOX Section 203.

title: EU AI Act Risk Classification
description: Classify AI systems per EU AI Act risk categories with conformity assessment.

title: AI System Transparency
description: Inform users when interacting with AI systems and provide transparency labels.

title: Quality Management System
description: Establish QMS for consistent product/service quality and customer satisfaction.

title: Process Approach to Management
description: Manage activities as interrelated processes per ISO 9001 Clause 4.4.

title: Business Continuity Management System
description: Establish BCMS per ISO 22301 for service continuity during disruptions.

title: TUPE Transfer Compliance
description: Apply Transfer of Undertakings Protection of Employment regulations to UK transfers.

title: EU Whistleblower Protection
description: Maintain confidential whistleblower reporting channels per EU Directive 2019/1937.

title: AML Compliance for Professional Services
description: Apply BSA to designated non-financial businesses where required.

title: OFAC Client Screening
description: Screen clients against OFAC SDN list before engagement.

title: FCPA Anti-Bribery Compliance
description: Avoid corrupt payments to foreign officials in international engagements.

title: UK Bribery Act Compliance
description: Maintain adequate procedures to prevent bribery per Section 7.

title: Modern Slavery Statement
description: Publish annual modern slavery statement for UK businesses with £36M+ turnover.

title: EU CSRD Reporting
description: Report sustainability per EU Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive.

title: Professional Indemnity Insurance
description: Maintain professional indemnity insurance per jurisdiction requirements.

title: Privacy Information Management
description: Implement Privacy Information Management System per ISO 27701 extension to ISO 27001.

title: WCAG 2.1 Level AA
description: Meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA accessibility for client-facing portals.

title: European Accessibility Act
description: Comply with European Accessibility Act for products and services from June 2025.

title: ADA Title III Web Accessibility
description: Meet ADA Title III accessibility for client-facing US portals.

title: California Consumer Privacy Rights
description: Honor CCPA rights including right to know, delete, opt out of sale, and non-discrimination.

title: CPRA Right to Correct
description: Honor CPRA right to correct inaccurate personal information.

title: Virginia CDPA Rights
description: Honor Virginia Consumer Data Protection Act rights including opt-out.

title: Colorado Privacy Act
description: Comply with Colorado Privacy Act for Colorado consumer data.

title: Connecticut Data Privacy Act
description: Comply with Connecticut Data Privacy Act for CT consumer data.

title: Utah Consumer Privacy Act
description: Comply with Utah Consumer Privacy Act for UT consumer data.

title: GLBA Privacy Notice
description: Provide initial and annual privacy notices for financial services consumers.

title: GLBA Safeguards Rule
description: Develop comprehensive information security program for customer data.

title: TCPA Telemarketing Compliance
description: Comply with TCPA before automated telemarketing via SMS or auto-dialer.

title: CAN-SPAM Email Compliance
description: Comply with CAN-SPAM Act for commercial email communications.

title: PCI-DSS for Payment Processing
description: Apply PCI-DSS controls to client payment processing where applicable.

title: Cybersecurity Insurance
description: Maintain cybersecurity insurance with documented control attestations.

title: Cloud Security Controls
description: Apply cloud-specific information security controls per ISO 27017.

title: Cloud PII Protection
description: Apply ISO 27018 PII protection in public clouds acting as PII processors.

title: NIST CSF Adoption
description: Adopt NIST Cybersecurity Framework with maturity self-assessment.

title: NIST 800-53 Controls
description: Apply NIST SP 800-53 controls for federal contractor engagements.

title: FedRAMP Authorization
description: Maintain FedRAMP authorization for federal cloud services.

title: CMMC Level 2 for DoD
description: Maintain CMMC Level 2 certification for DoD contractor work with CUI.

title: ITAR Compliance
description: Apply International Traffic in Arms Regulations to defense article and service exports.

title: EAR Compliance
description: Apply Export Administration Regulations to dual-use technology exports.

title: Joint Controller Arrangements
description: Document joint controller arrangements per GDPR Article 26.

title: Article 28 Processor Agreements
description: Execute Article 28-compliant data processing agreements with processors.

title: Personnel Information Security Competence
description: Ensure personnel competence in information security per ISO 27001 Clause 7.2.

title: Information Security Awareness
description: Maintain information security awareness program for all personnel.

title: Internal and External Communication
description: Define what, when, with whom, and how to communicate about ISMS.

title: Documented Information Control
description: Control documented information for distribution, access, retrieval, and use.

title: Operational Planning and Control
description: Plan, implement, and control processes to meet information security requirements.

title: ISMS Performance Evaluation
description: Monitor, measure, analyze, and evaluate ISMS effectiveness.

title: ISMS Continual Improvement
description: Continually improve suitability, adequacy, and effectiveness of ISMS.

title: Automated Decision-Making Rights
description: Provide right not to be subject to automated decisions with legal effects.

title: Children's Personal Data Consent
description: Apply parental consent requirements for children under 16 (or member state lower limit).

title: Risk Management Principles
description: Apply ISO 31000 risk management principles to professional services delivery.
